# Flux

A semi-transparent stopwatch that floats above all your windows — perfect for tracking daily tasks or any timed activity without getting in your way.

[![Youtube Video](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/445f9ef9-b36e-4f54-9d1e-5d836ca4b3dc)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=m5omA17_2zk)
<!-- Generated by https://t.cuts.so/github/video -->

## Features

- **Persistent** — Remembers your time if you quit and reopen the app
- **Always visible** — Stays on top of all windows and across all desktops
- **Draggable** — Position it anywhere on your screen
- **Customizable** — Change font, size, color, opacity, and shortcuts

## Platforms

| Platform | Directory | Requirements |
|----------|-----------|--------------|
| **macOS** | [flux-swift/](flux-swift/) | macOS 15 (Sequoia)+, Xcode 16+ |
| **Windows** | [flux-win/](flux-win/) | Windows 10/11 x64, .NET 10 SDK (to build) |

See each platform's README for build instructions and platform-specific details.

## Usage

### Basic Controls

| Action | What it does |
|--------|--------------|
| **Click** | Configurable (default: none) |
| **Right-click** | Reset to 00:00 |
| **Drag** | Move the timer |

### Keyboard Shortcuts

| Shortcut (macOS / Windows) | Action |
|----------------------------|--------|
| `Space` | Pause / Resume |
| `⌘C` / `Ctrl+C` | Copy time (nearest minutes) |
| `⌘S` / `Ctrl+S` | Set a specific time |
| `⌘Y` / `Ctrl+Y` | View history |
| `⌘,` / `Ctrl+,` | Open settings |
| `⌘Q` / `Ctrl+Q` | Quit |

### Global Shortcuts

These work even when Flux is not focused:

| Shortcut (macOS / Windows) | Action |
|----------------------------|--------|
| `⌃⌘T` / `Ctrl+Alt+T` | Toggle pause/resume |
| `⌃⇧T` / `Ctrl+Alt+Shift+T` | Copy time + Reset to 00:00 |

## Settings

Press `⌘,` (macOS) or `Ctrl+,` (Windows) to customize:

**Appearance** — Font family, size, text color, opacity

**Shortcuts** — Rebind any keyboard shortcut, customize mouse click actions

**General** — Launch at login, show in fullscreen

## Time Display

- Under 1 hour: `MM:SS` (e.g., `05:30`)
- 1 hour or more: `H:MM:SS` (e.g., `1:30:00`)
